name: SnapDOM
when_to_use: 需要把已渲染 DOM 连同计算样式、伪元素、字体与 shadow DOM 快速导出为 PNG/JPEG/WebP/SVG 时用它而非手写,因为原生在深克隆、资源内联和高保真栅格化上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认完全做不到可靠 DOM 截图:无法递归冻结 computed style、重建伪元素、嵌入实际使用的字体与跨 shadow root 内容,也无法稳定处理 DPR 和跨域资源;SnapDOM 把这些步骤收进单一异步调用。

data_in.note: node 是已连接、完成布局且资源已就绪的 Element,不是 HTML 字符串或 CSS 定位器;库读取其实际像素几何并生成自包含快照。跨域图片/字体仍须 CORS 可读或提供 useProxy。

schema.node: Element —— 要捕获的已渲染根节点

options?.scale?: positive number —— 默认 1,优先于 width/height
options?.width?: positive number(px) —— 默认源节点边界宽;只给一边时保持比例
options?.height?: positive number(px) —— 默认源节点边界高;只给一边时保持比例
options?.backgroundColor?: CSS color string —— PNG/SVG 默认透明,JPEG/WebP 默认 #ffffff
options?.embedFonts?: boolean —— 默认 false;图标字体仍始终嵌入
options?.exclude?: string[] —— 默认 [],匹配后从快照隐藏

spec.note: 仅作为消费端预览导出结果的默认像素高度 400px;SnapDOM 本身读取 node 的计算像素尺寸,不要用 vh 或百分比高,也不要拿本 spec 隐式裁剪源节点。

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;调用者选择一种原生导出结果。

api_surface.reusable: const shot = await snapdom(data.node, data.options ?? {}); await shot.toPng(); await shot.toBlob({type:'webp'})

peer.note: 它消费任意已经渲染完成的 component DOM;预览、文件命名、下载或回传由消费 AI 自己写,本条不规定统一事件出口。

isolation.evidence: Verified against dist/snapdom.mjs via grep. styleInject=no: only TRANSIENTLY appends probe `<link rel=stylesheet data-snapdom="injected-import">` to head to read cross-origin stylesheet rules, then removes all (`for(y of h) try{y.remove()}`); no persistent style/link left. domMutation=yes: Ti()/Xe creates a PERSISTENT cached hidden singleton `<div id="snapdom-measure-slot" aria-hidden="true" position:absolute left:-99999px 0x0 opacity:0 contain:size layout style>` appended to document.documentElement and reused across captures, PLUS transient measurement nodes and self-removing download-anchors on document.body (paired appendChild/removeChild, anchor.click()+remove()). No interactive UI (no tooltip/modal/menu/portal) -- all hidden/offscreen/transient -- but the top-level DOM IS mutated. events=no: grep found 0 window/document addEventListener; only a try/catch MutationObserver on document.head for font/@import resource discovery, no persistent event listeners. shadow=conditional: headless primitive -- callable from a shadow-scoped widget and can capture nodes that live inside shadow roots (README cross-shadow capture), but its measurement/rasterization scaffolding lives in the top-level document (persistent #snapdom-measure-slot on documentElement + transient body/head nodes), so it is NOT fully contained within the widget's shadow root, though every injected node is hidden/offscreen/transient.
